cluster_summaries.label: Pay & Benefits
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees frequently cite competitive pay and comprehensive benefits as primary reasons for satisfaction.

cluster_summaries.label: Flexibility & Care
cluster_summaries.summary: While some value onsite conveniences and team support, many report that maintaining a healthy work-life balance is difficult.

cluster_summaries.label: Growth & Recognition
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees appreciate the opportunity to work on large-scale projects but often feel there is little room for upward mobility.

cluster_summaries.label: Culture & Belonging
cluster_summaries.summary: The collaborative nature of teams is a highlight, with many employees valuing their helpful and diverse colleagues.

cluster_summaries.label: Safety & Fairness
cluster_summaries.summary: Job stability is recognized as a positive factor, contributing to a sense of security in the industry.

cluster_summaries.label: Burnout & Workload
cluster_summaries.summary: Reports of understaffing and high-stress environments suggest that current workloads are negatively impacting some employees.

cluster_summaries.label: Work-Life Pressure
cluster_summaries.summary: Excessive meetings and a lack of flexibility are cited as major barriers to achieving a sustainable work-life balance.

cluster_summaries.label: Stagnation
cluster_summaries.summary: A perceived lack of career advancement and recognition leads to feelings of stagnation for many employees.

cluster_summaries.label: Unsafe or Unfair Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Concerns regarding management favoritism, toxic behavior, and lack of accountability are prominent in some reviews.

cluster_summaries.label: Disconnected Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Some employees feel isolated or unsupported by management, noting difficulties in accessing full-time opportunities.
